content: @sentry/nextjs 10.60.0 (current, June 2026). Next.js 15+ requires v8+; v9→v10 migration path available. Setup via npx @sentry/wizard@latest -i nextjs creates instrumentation-client.ts, sentry.server.config.ts, sentry.edge.config.ts. Use withSentryConfig() in next.config.ts. App Router: global-error.tsx captures render errors; onRequestError hook (requires 8.28+) captures Server Component/middleware errors. Automatic instrumentation for API routes and data fetchers. Supports performance tracing.
